name: Cinnamon Graham Monkey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
2. Divide the thawed loaf of Bridgford Frozen Bread Dough into 16 equal pieces. If using rolls, there is no need to divide the dough.
3. In a small bowl, combine granulated sugar, graham cracker crumbs, chopped walnuts or pecans (if using), and cinnamon. Set aside.
4. Dip each piece of dough in melted butter and then roll it in the sugar mixture. Make sure that the dough is coated generously with the sugar mixture.
5. Place each piece of dough evenly in the pan in a single layer.
6. Let the dough rise until double in size or until the dough has risen to just under the top rim of the pan.
7. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the bread is well browned and sounds hollow when tapped on top.
9. Remove from the oven and let the loaf cool in the pan for 10 minutes.
10. Remove from the pan and serve.
